ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2010 Continued To May-10-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert F. Cohen, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Gibril Wilson who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Chris Aire, an individual, or SOLID 21, Inc., a California corporation.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 8, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on January 25, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, amd good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Grbril Wilson, and against the Defaulted Defendants Chris Aire, an individual, and SOLID 21, Inc., as follows:

Damages/Principal - $270,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $40,758.90.
Attorney's Fees - $1,500.00.
Costs - $492.68, for a total judgment in the amount of $312,751.58.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
